modmenu.descriptionTranslation.aetherkla: The world has a voice. You are learning to play it.
advancements.aetherklang.on_beat_hit.des: Land your first strike in time with the rhythm
advancements.aetherklang.defeat_choral.d: Defeat Choral and end the dissonance
kodex.aetherklang.title: CODEX OF RESONANCE
kodex.aetherklang.subtitle: TONARIUM · ARCHIVE OF THE WORLD-VOICE
kodex.aetherklang.locked.hint: This page does not answer your voice yet. Discover its resonance in the world.
kodex.aetherklang.page.welcome.title: The First Note
kodex.aetherklang.page.welcome.subtitle: A world that listens
kodex.aetherklang.page.welcome.body.1: The world has a voice. Stone hums, crystal answers, and every step marks a beat. You are a Resonant: one who can hear and shape that hidden song.
kodex.aetherklang.page.welcome.body.2: This Codex is your Tonarium. Its pages awaken as you meet beings, hear places, and act at the right moment.
kodex.aetherklang.page.world_song.title: The Song of the World
kodex.aetherklang.page.world_song.body.1: Before the first structures, Aetherklang ran through all things. Its five moods kept growth, motion, and rest in balance.
kodex.aetherklang.page.world_song.body.2: Every action echoes. Clean timing strengthens the world; hurried strikes leave dissonance behind.
kodex.aetherklang.page.dissonance.title: The Broken Voice
kodex.aetherklang.page.dissonance.body.1: Dissonance is not silence. It is sound without accord: torn apart, repeated, and forged into a weapon by Choral.
kodex.aetherklang.page.dissonance.body.2: Close rifts, play precisely, and retune at an altar. Violence without listening only strengthens its refrain.
kodex.aetherklang.page.mood_compass.body: Moods are resonance stances, not classes. Cycle them with M to adapt range, tempo, and risk.
A Mood Altar stabilizes your choice. Read its color, particles, and HUD before beginning a combo.
kodex.aetherklang.page.five_moods.title: The Five Moods
kodex.aetherklang.page.five_moods.body.1: SILENCE lowers creature awareness. JOY heals you and nearby allies in gentle pulses. WRATH empowers offensive resonance.
kodex.aetherklang.page.five_moods.body.2: SORROW carries you through slowing and control. WONDER grants luck, note sparks, and unexpected opportunity.
kodex.aetherklang.page.five_moods.body.3: No mood wins alone. A Resonant listens first, then changes.
kodex.aetherklang.page.beat_windows.body: PERFECT: at 120 BPM, within ±40 ms. Gold feedback marks maximum RP and effect.
GOOD: within ±100 ms. Cyan feedback confirms stable timing and normal resonance.
MISS: outside ±100 ms. The action may work, but builds no perfect chain.
On-beat actions, discovery, and harmonic support generate RP. Perfect chains improve the return.
Instrument abilities consume RP. Keep a reserve for movement or defense instead of spending every note.
Missed beats, rifts, and risky powers raise dissonance. High values distort encounters and empower Choral.
Clean cadences, Silence, and closed rifts calm it. Break a combo rather than forcing a bad beat.
kodex.aetherklang.page.tuning_fork.title: The Tuning Fork
The Tuning Fork finds hidden resonance, tests crystals, and reveals the base pulse of a place.
Carry it while exploring. Its answer is quieter than a quest marker, but more precise than a guess.
kodex.aetherklang.page.arsenal.title: Blade, Harp, Hammer
kodex.aetherklang.page.arsenal.subtitle: Three voices at three ranges
kodex.aetherklang.page.arsenal.body.1: The RESONANCE BLADE performs quick melee cadences and rewards rhythm changes.
kodex.aetherklang.page.arsenal.body.2: The ECHO HARP shapes ranged sound and controls space. The BASS HAMMER breaks posture with heavy accents.
kodex.aetherklang.page.arsenal.body.3: Every instrument needs good timing, the right mood, and enough RP.
kodex.aetherklang.page.echo_boots.title: Echo Boots
kodex.aetherklang.page.echo_boots.subtit: The space between is also a beat
kodex.aetherklang.page.echo_boots.body.1: Echo Boots store the aftersound of your steps. Press R to trigger a Resonance Dash when available.
kodex.aetherklang.page.echo_boots.body.2: Dash through shockwaves, toward a new beat, or out of Choral's cadence—not merely forward.
kodex.aetherklang.page.crystals.title: Four Resonance Crystals
kodex.aetherklang.page.crystals.subtitle: Indigo · Cyan · Gold · Magenta
kodex.aetherklang.page.crystals.body.1: Indigo stores base tone, Cyan conducts resonance, Gold holds precise timing, and Magenta binds dangerous dissonance.
kodex.aetherklang.page.crystals.body.2: Crystals are both guides and materials for instruments, altars, and portals.
kodex.aetherklang.page.mood_altar.title: The Mood Altar
kodex.aetherklang.page.mood_altar.body.1: A Mood Altar aligns resonance, stabilizes moods, and prepares demanding cadences.
kodex.aetherklang.page.mood_altar.body.2: Build it somewhere calm and protected. Nearby dissonance can distort the ritual.
kodex.aetherklang.page.rift_portal.title: Rift & Glockenspiel
A Dissonance Rift spills broken sound and creatures. Close it with tuned actions, not blind damage.
The Glockenspiel Portal is its controlled opposite: a stable sequence opening the Tonarium.
kodex.aetherklang.page.dissonance_spirit: A mistake that learned to walk
Dissonance Spirits gather near rifts. Their irregular attacks tempt early strikes and punish panic.
Keep distance, find the recurring offbeat, and answer with one clean accent.
kodex.aetherklang.page.echo_denizens.sub: Not every strange sound is an enemy
kodex.aetherklang.page.echo_denizens.bod: The Echo Guardian tests posture and endurance. Its heavy patterns leave a clear counter-window.
Echo Notes are small floating memories. Follow them toward resonance, secrets, or a safe beat.
kodex.aetherklang.page.tonarium.title: The Tonarium
kodex.aetherklang.page.tonarium.subtitle: Archive beyond the echo
kodex.aetherklang.page.tonarium.body.1: In the Tonarium, sound becomes landscape: string bridges, echo chambers, and crystal archives react to mood and beat.
kodex.aetherklang.page.tonarium.body.2: Bring spare instruments and RP. Distances deceive, and some paths exist only during a cadence.
kodex.aetherklang.page.portal_rite.title: Portal Rite
A Glockenspiel Portal requires resonance crystals and a stable tone sequence. Mistakes raise local dissonance.
Secure the site, tune at an altar, and begin only when you can hear the base pulse.
kodex.aetherklang.page.choral.title: Choral
kodex.aetherklang.page.choral.subtitle: Conductor of broken voices
kodex.aetherklang.page.choral.body.1: Choral is a conductor, not a silent monster. It gathers dissonance, layers attacks into phrases, and changes the arena's beat.
kodex.aetherklang.page.choral.body.2: Watch the baton, not only the body. Every phrase announces its finale and safest response window.
kodex.aetherklang.page.final_cadence.bod: Destroy dissonant anchors first, reserve RP for movement and defense, and answer at the end of a phrase.
In the final phase, safe zones alternate with the beat. One calm perfect action beats three panicked hits.
kodex.aetherklang.page.progression.title: Path of the Resonant
kodex.aetherklang.page.progression.subti: From first crystal to final cadence
1. Find crystals and craft a Tuning Fork. 2. Learn the pulse on safe targets. 3. Build a Mood Altar.
4. Craft an instrument and close rifts. 5. Gather all four crystal colors. 6. Open a Glockenspiel Portal.
7. Explore the Tonarium, read Choral's phrases, and end the broken cadence.
kodex.aetherklang.page.controls.title: Controls
kodex.aetherklang.page.controls.subtitle: Hands on the beat
kodex.aetherklang.page.controls.body.1: K opens the Codex, M cycles moods, and R triggers Resonance Dash. Using the Codex item also opens it.
kodex.aetherklang.page.controls.body.2: Rebind every key under Options → Controls → Aetherklang. Escape closes the Tonarium.
kodex.aetherklang.page.commands.title: Commands
kodex.aetherklang.page.commands.subtitle: Tools for testing & staging
kodex.aetherklang.page.commands.body.1: /aetherklang checks the mod. Subcommands rp, mood, beat, and codex report their systems' status.
kodex.aetherklang.page.commands.body.2: These are diagnostics in the current release. Normal progression comes from play, not the console.
message.aetherklang.stimmgabel.empty: The Tuning Fork hears no resonance source nearby.
message.aetherklang.altar.no_crystals: No resonance crystals answer within six blocks.
message.aetherklang.rift.seal_failed: The rift resists. Sealing it requires %s RP.
message.aetherklang.portal.denied: The portal demands the Codex or %s RP.
message.aetherklang.portal.unavailable: The Kammerton cadence cannot be reached.
message.aetherklang.portal.arrival: Kammerton · Follow the golden cadence to Choral's arena.
message.aetherklang.portal.return: The Glockenspiel returns you to the Overworld.
message.aetherklang.choral.awakens: Choral awakens · Answer the broken cadence!
